entry.title: New: CR 25-70 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
Recommending the following: 1. FIRST READING of Bill 106, CD1 (2025), to designate property located at 8303 Kamehameha V Highway, Kaunakakai, Hawai‘i, as “Mapulehu Kulāiwi”; and 2. FIRST READING of Bill 107, CD1 (2025), to designate properties identified as Ha‘ikū Sugar East Subdivision lots 1, 3, 4, 5, and 6, Hawai‘i, as “Hāmākualoa Kulāiwi.”

Kōmike Aloha ʻĀina (2025-2027)

View on the council site
